zh.lifeSummary: 當Terricus Harang Herring於大約1270年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親Sir John Herring of Edmonstone - Lord of Gilmerton, Drum and Goodtrees31歲，母親Clarissy Nye26歲。他於1290年與Lucia在英國英格蘭多瑟特哈爾頓 赫林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Herring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London), Dutch, and German: metonymic occupational name for a herring fisher or for a seller of the fish, or perhaps for someone who habitually ate herring, from Middle English hering (Old English hǣring, hēring), Dutch haring, Middle High German hærinc. In some cases it may have been a nickname in the sense of a trifle, something of little value, a meaning which is found in medieval phrases and proverbial expressions such as ‘to like neither herring nor barrel’, i.e. not to like something at all.
German: habitational name from Herringen in Westphalia.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Hering  .

variants.name: Hearing
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Herring  .
Americanized form of German Häring (see Haring ) or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Herrig
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Herrig in the Rhineland or from Herringen in Westphalia. See also   Herring  .

variants.name: Hering
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hasso, Alfons, Alois, Arno, Ernst, Erwin, Florian, Gerhard, Guenther, Kurt, Ludwig, Manfred.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German hærinc ‘herring’, German Hering, a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, particularly a seller of herrings, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a herring. In some cases the Jewish surname is artificial. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German and Jewish variant Häring. Compare Haring .

German and Dutch: habitational name from any of several places and farmhouses so named, for instance near Zeesse in Overijssel, originally inhabited by a certain Here or Hero and his kin. Here or Hero is a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name with the element heri ‘army’.

nameMeanings.name: Harang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a seller of herrings or for a fisher, from hareng ‘herring’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Terricus Harang Herring was born about 1270, in Dorset, England, his father, Sir John Herring of Edmonstone - Lord of Gilmerton, Drum and Goodtrees, was 31 and his mother, Clarissy Nye, was 26. He married Lucia in 1290, in Chaldon Herring, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Lucia en 1290, à Chaldon Herring, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Terricus Harang Herringが約1270年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Sir John Herring of Edmonstone - Lord of Gilmerton, Drum and Goodtreesは31歳，母Clarissy Nyeは26歳であった。1290年にイギリスイギリスドールセトチャルドン ハーリングでLuciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスドールセトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Terricus Harang Herring(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Herring of Edmonstone - Lord of Gilmerton, Drum and Goodtrees(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Clarissy Nye(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 차던 허링에서 Lucia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Terricus Harang Herring родился около 1270 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Herring of Edmonstone - Lord of Gilmerton, Drum and Goodtrees было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Clarissy Nye, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia в 1290 г. в местности халдон хирринг, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
